sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111666" key="fi/mwtron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῑ´μ-ωτρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n111666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for stopping up,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
